docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, RAYMOND WONG, LORRAINE AS TO DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, HUMBERTO IND/DBA SASHA'S AUTOMOTIVE & BETO'S AUTO REPAIR MELENDEZ, EDUARDO IND/DBA SASHA'S AUTOMOTIVE & BETO'S AUTO REPAIR PERALTA, AUGUSTO IND/DBA SMOG CHECK & SOLUTIONS DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

CERTIFICATE OF SERVICE RE:STIPULATION FOR ENTRY JUDGMENT FILED BY THE PLAINTIFFS RAYMOND & LORRAINE WONG
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT MELENDEZ, EDUARDO IND/DBA SASHA'S AUTOMOTIVE & BETO'S AUTO REPAIR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPINOZA, HUMBERTO IND/DBA SASHA'S AUTOMOTIVE & BETO'S AUTO REPAIR PERALTA, AUGUSTO IND/DBA SMOG CHECK & SOLUTIONS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2140 FOLSOM STREET, S.F. CA., DEFENDANTS STAY AS OF MAY 31, 2001, PLTF. MAY OBTAIN WRIT OF EXECUTION OR POSSESSION ON OR AFTER DATE IN ORDER TO EVICT ANY AND OR ALL DEFENDANTS FROM THE PREMISES. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR HIS OR HER OWN COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTY'S FEE NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
